evidence.content: Iran reportedly offers to discuss terms for ending the war with US and Israel.
Russian FM Sergey Lavrov calls on Israel, Iran, and the US to immediately end the war.
Chinese Professor says Iran doesn't need to fire a single bullet at a US soldier, just destroy 1 water factory.
President of Spain Pedro Sanchez: Spain will fight against imperialist Israel.
Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez on Iran: US administration dragged us into a war in the Middle East.
China is waging war against the USA through Iran, with Iranian missiles hitting accurately.
While the world watches the Strait of Hormuz, someone is systematically destroying Russia’s energy fleet.
Former U.S. Army Colonel Douglas Macgregor claims all US bases have been destroyed.
Claim: Iran retaliates, Tel Aviv has just become a ghost town, showing scale of destruction.
